human:
POINTS:
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper/META-INF/MANIFEST.MF:11] Why is this necessary? If not, let's just leave it as it since 0.13.8 is not in SimRel and causes the build to fail.
v5:
SUMMARY:
This PR fixes a flaky JS-TS rename test by adding a wizard-type guard on shell detection, refactoring button discovery to a set-based approach, and increasing the LS initialization sleep from 2000ms to 5000ms. A pom.xml plugin version bump is also included.

POINTS:
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:111] Potential NPE: `shell.getData().getClass().getName().startsWith(...)` chains on `shell.getData()` without a null check. The `SWT.Paint` filter fires for ALL widgets painted on the display — not just LTK wizard dialogs — so shells without data (notifications, tooltips, etc.) could reach this branch and cause an NPE. Recommend: `Object data = shell.getData(); if (data != null && data.getClass().getName().startsWith(...))`.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:88] Sleep increased from 2000ms to 5000ms. This is now the longest `DisplayHelper.sleep()` in the test suite (next longest is 4000ms in TestAngular for Angular LS init). Confirm whether the extra time is truly needed, or if a smaller bump (e.g., 3000ms) would suffice — CI wall-clock impact accumulates.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:54] The wizard class name constant references `org.eclipse.ltk.internal.ui.refactoring.Refactoring`, which is an Eclipse internal API. While this is a pragmatic approach for test code (and more reliable than matching shell text alone), be aware it could break if the LTK package structure changes in a future Eclipse release. Consider a comment noting this fragility.
- [pom.xml:169] The `download-maven-plugin` version bump (1.6.1 → 1.6.7) is unrelated to the test fix described in the PR title. Consider splitting this into a separate commit or PR to keep the change scope clear, or update the PR description to mention it.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:164] Nit: `static private` is unconventional; consider `private static` for consistency with standard Java formatting conventions. (Applies to `pressOk` at line 175 and `pressCancel` at line 187 as well.)
v7:
SUMMARY:
This PR hardens a flaky JS/TS rename UI test by adding wizard-class-name filtering to distinguish refactoring dialogs and refactoring button detection into a single-pass Set collection. It also increases the LS initialization sleep and bumps a Maven plugin version.

POINTS:
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:111] **Potential NPE regression**: The new guard `shell.getData().getClass().getName().startsWith(WIZARD_CLASSNAME_TEMPLATE)` will throw `NullPointerException` if `getData()` returns `null` for any non-IDE shell. The original code only checked `shell.getText()` which is safe. Consider: `shell.getData() != null && shell.getData().getClass().getName().startsWith(...)`.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:89] Sleep increased from 2000ms to 5000ms. This triples the fixed wait on every run. Consider a `DisplayHelper` condition polling for actual LS readiness (e.g., rename command enabled) instead of a blind sleep.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:53] `WIZARD_CLASSNAME_TEMPLATE` targets `org.eclipse.ltk.internal.ui.refactoring.Refactoring` — an internal Eclipse package. This is fragile against platform changes; consider documenting the assumption or providing a fallback.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:164-171] `getButtons()` collects the full widget-tree into a `HashSet` instead of the old `hasButton()` short-circuit search. Semantically cleaner for multi-button checks, but note the algorithm change from early-return to full traversal.
- [org.eclipse.wildwebdeveloper.tests/src/org/eclipse/wildwebdeveloper/tests/TestJsTs.java:164,176,188] `static private` is redundant — `private` already prevents inheritance. Either drop `static` or keep it consistently to signal no instance-state dependency.
- [pom.xml:169] `download-maven-plugin` 1.6.1 → 1.6.7 is a benign patch-level bump; no concerns.
